concerns.detail: Full name of student 'ding yufei' appears in text, identifying a private individual in relation to academic misconduct allegations
Use of profanity '瞎JB' (vulgar term) in description of professor's management style
Deletion of substantive allegations regarding paper fraud ('Paper造假') and threat to publish evidence, replaced with unrelated financial complaints
concerns.excerpt: Paper造假 听说过这个事情...信不信我把paper名字和证据列上来？
